default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting purpose

[Discuss business progress and deal pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Clients are showing strong interest and eagerness to invest/work with the company](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Need to focus on closing more deals and ramping up content production capacity](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Have $1.5M in pipeline currently, aiming for $5M in the next year](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Expenses have increased due to upfront payments for talent/tools, but revenue opportunities look promising](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

## Topics

### Client Interest and Reactions

  - [Clients are enthusiastically responding with interest to invest, hire, or work together](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [The strong positive reactions are surprising and encouraging](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

### Deal Pipeline and Closing

  - [Currently have $1.5M in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Need to be closing deals 24/7 to hit targets](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [May need to take couple weeks fully dedicated to closing after upcoming webinar](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Goal of $5M in pipeline within next year is achievable if they keep delivering and closing](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

### Content Production Capacity

  - [Need to build out home-based content production clusters with writers](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Probably need 5 people to operate and produce content at desired scale](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Recent Deal Details

  - [Closed $27K/month deal, $108K paid upfront for 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Client scoped down from original request, but still a good deal](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Increased Expenses

  - [Expenses went up from upfront payments for talent, tools, agencies](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Examples: $15K creative agency, $9K Oceans, $9K Athena, $4K Molly](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [But opportunities like upcoming webinar make it worthwhile](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Focus on closing more deals rapidly after upcoming webinar](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Ramp up content production capacity by building out home-based writer teams](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Manage cash flow with upfront payments while aggressively pursuing revenue opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/ery5rAkSf5zJyNMke-wVeCgpT7mUnPt5?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

action_items.description: Take two weeks off from work initially to focus on closing deals back to back after webinar tomorrow
